results.title: C++ Tutorial for Beginners - Learn C++ in 1 Hour
results.reason: Mosh is highly praised in comments for his structured 'fundamentals-first' approach, making this the gold standard for absolute beginners.
summary: How to set up your coding environment
Writing your first simple computer program
Using variables to store and manage data
Basic math and logic inside your code

results.title: C++ Basics in One Shot - Strivers A2Z DSA Course - L1
results.reason: Viewer appreciation is high for the logical flow toward Data Structures (DSA), providing more depth than a standard 'basics' video.
summary: Understanding the basic structure of a program
How to take input from a user
Making decisions using if and else statements
Repeating tasks easily using simple loops

results.title: C++ tutorial for beginners 👨‍💻
results.reason: Bro Code is consistently cited by beginners for clear environment setup and bite-sized, digestible explanations.
summary: Getting started with the C++ language
Displaying text and numbers on the screen
Storing different types of information correctly
Essential rules for writing clean code

results.title: How to Program A Calculator in C++! (Great C++ Microsoft Visual Studio Beginner Project)
results.reason: Project-based learning is highly effective for beginners, and comments confirm the calculator is a successful first milestone.
summary: Setting up a project in Visual Studio
Creating a tool that does basic math
Handling user numbers and math symbols
Building a real project from start to finish

results.title: 15 Years Writing C++ - Advice for new programmers
results.reason: This is high-quality advice/meta-learning rather than a technical tutorial, making it helpful but not a primary learning resource.
summary: Important tips for starting your coding journey
Common mistakes that new learners should avoid
How to think like a professional programmer
Best ways to practice and improve skills
